dynamicspawns.outbreak.started: ⚠ MASS OUTBREAK! A swarm of %1$s appeared near X=%2$s, Z=%3$s!
dynamicspawns.outbreak.milestone1: ✦ The outbreak weakens! Shiny chance x2 for %1$s!
dynamicspawns.outbreak.milestone2: ✦✦ The outbreak is almost over! Shiny chance x3 for %1$s!
dynamicspawns.outbreak.finale: ★ Outbreak cleared! A special %1$s appeared as a reward!
dynamicspawns.outbreak.cleared: The Mass Outbreak of %1$s has been cleared!
dynamicspawns.outbreak.ended_time: The Mass Outbreak of %1$s has ended (time ran out).
dynamicspawns.outbreak.stopped: The Mass Outbreak of %1$s was terminated.
dynamicspawns.command.cannot_evolve: %1$s cannot evolve — hordes need a base species that evolves (e.g. bidoof).
dynamicspawns.command.horde_failed: Failed to spawn the horde leader.
dynamicspawns.command.outbreak_limit: Simultaneous outbreak limit reached (%1$s). Use /dynamicspawns outbreak stop or raise maxSimultaneous in the config.
dynamicspawns.command.too_close: Too close to an active outbreak — minimum distance: %1$s chunks.
dynamicspawns.command.start_failed: Could not start the outbreak (no players online or no valid position away from active outbreaks).
dynamicspawns.command.info_line: #%1$s %2$s at X=%3$s, Z=%4$s | spawned: %5$s, cleared: %6$s, shiny rolls: x%7$s
